recommendations.title: Babylon A.D.
recommendations.overview: A veteran-turned-mercenary is hired to take a young woman with a secret from post-apocalyptic Eastern Europe to New York City.

recommendations.title: Rebellion

recommendations.title: Gothika

recommendations.title: Ordinary Love
recommendations.overview: An extraordinary look at the lives of a middle-aged couple in the midst of the wife's breast cancer diagnosis.

recommendations.title: Good Vibrations
recommendations.overview: The story of music legend Terri Hooley, a key figure in Belfast's punk rock scene. Hooley founded the Good Vibrations store from which a record label sprung, representing bands such as The Undertones, Rudi and The Outcasts.

recommendations.title: Street Flow
recommendations.overview: Noumouké, from the suburb of Paris, is about to decide which brother's foot steps to follow - the lawyer student Soulaymaan or the gangster Demba.

recommendations.title: Birthday Girl
